Small stand off side of path. Access: Public.
lots of blackberries off the trail. easy access via mowed grass. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: July-unknown.
Large Black Walnut Tree in front of library Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: September-October.

Black Walnut tree at Harlinsdale Farm Park.  Enter the drive and it will be on the left just before the two small houses before you reach the barn. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: August-October.
Large Pecan Tree in front of library next to black walnut tree Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: October-November.

Three very large pecan trees across three lots of historic houses. Dropping pecans into mid December, 2025

The shells are very thin and can be cracked in your hand if you press them against each other.
